name: membrane-metabolism-loop
description: The minimal membrane/metabolism co-construction loop — a precarious, self-bounding identity that emerges from the molecular domain. Metabolism makes lipids; the membrane grows by incorporating them and decays without them; the volume is DERIVED from the membrane (the boundary emerges, never declared) and couples back into the concentration the bimolecular lipid step runs on. Supply (rate=0 starves) is the only boundary inflow.

supply_rate.description: Boundary nutrient inflow. 0 starves the cell — the identity then dissipates.
